overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk-style food stall kitchen in a video game. The camera moves steadily from a digital menu board past a vertical meat rotisserie and cooking stations, ending at a service window where a child NPC stands looking out into a neon-lit street. The environment features industrial metal surfaces, warm yellow lighting mixed with red neon, and dense atmospheric detail typical of high-end game engines.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall entry with digital menu and rotisserie

events.description: camera pans up from menu board to reveal vertical meat rotisserie against yellow wall

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the narrow kitchen space, observing the food preparation equipment and menu displays

entered.detail: illuminated menu display with red neon text and food icons mounted on dark green wall
tall vertical spit with stacked roasted meat pieces rotating slowly
stained yellow wall with dark horizontal trim lines
stainless steel food preparation surface with dark countertop

segments.scene_description: The segment begins focused on a digital menu board mounted on a dark wall in a narrow cyberpunk food stall. As the camera moves forward, it pans up to reveal a large vertical rotisserie with stacked meat against a yellow wall, with stainless steel prep counters lining the right side. The space is dimly lit with warm artificial light, creating an intimate industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial kitchen prep area with active cooking station

events.description: passing the rotisserie and entering the main cooking area with frying pan and storage boxes

agents.ego_description: continuing through the kitchen past cooking equipment, storage boxes, and metal mesh partitions

entered.detail: black wok containing food with distinctive red handle sitting on the counter
white cardboard storage box with orange 'All Foods' logo printed on the side
commercial gas burner setup with pots and cooking utensils arranged nearby
chain link fence partition with red and blue neon lights visible through the gaps

segments.scene_description: Moving past the rotisserie, the scene transitions to a commercial kitchen prep area featuring an active cooking station with a frying pan containing food. The camera passes cardboard storage boxes and metal mesh partitions while continuing along the narrow corridor. Red neon lights glow through the mesh fencing on the right, adding color to the otherwise yellow-lit industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: service counter with security mesh window overlooking neon street

events.description: child NPC comes into view standing on crate at service window looking outside

agents.ego_description: walking toward the service window where a child stands looking out at the street, then stopping nearby

notable_agents.action: child standing on cardboard box looking out through mesh window into the neon-lit street

entered.detail: large service window with metal mesh screening overlooking the street with visible neon signs
long illuminated fluorescent light fixture mounted on the ceiling above the counter
commercial microwave oven sitting on the left counter near the service area
colorful neon signs and street lights visible through the mesh window

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a service window with metal mesh screening that overlooks a neon-lit street outside. A child NPC stands on a crate at the counter looking out the window, becoming the focal point as the camera stops nearby. Fluorescent lights illuminate this area more brightly than previous sections, revealing additional details like a microwave oven and service counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, industrial cyberpunk kitchen that transitions from a dim prep area into a brightly lit service window. It begins focused on a digital menu board before panning up to reveal a large vertical meat rotisserie set against a warm yellow wall and stainless steel counters. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a commercial cooking station with a frying pan and cardboard storage, where red neon light begins to glow through metal mesh partitions. The environment then opens up as the camera passes through the narrow corridor toward a more brightly illuminated service area featuring a microwave and counter. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at a mesh-screened window overlooking a neon-lit street, centering on a child NPC standing on a crate and gazing outside.
